en: So, uh, when are you done with those meetings? Like the week after I'm 21.
Yeah? They gonna hook you up with a job or what?
Yeah, fuckin' sit in a room and do long division for the next 50 years.
ko: 그래, 다음 50년 동안 방에 앉아서 나눗셈이나 하게 된다면.

en: Yeah, probably make some nice bank though.
I'm gonna be a fuckin' lab rat. Better than this shit. Way out of here.
What do I want a way out of here for? I mean, I'm gonna fuckin' live here the rest of my life.
You know, be neighbors, you know, we'll have little kids, fuckin' take them to Little League together up Foley Field.
Look, you're my best friend, so don't take this the wrong way, but in 20 years, if you're still living here,
ko: 너는 내 가장 친한 친구니까, 오해하지 마,

en: comin' over to my house to watch the Patriots game, still workin' construction, I'll fuckin' kill you.
ko: 내 집에 와서 패트리어츠 경기 보면서,

en: That's not a threat. That's a fact. I'll fuckin' kill you. What the fuck are you talkin' about?
ko: 위협이 아니라, 사실이야. 널 죽일 거라고.

en: Look, you got something none of us have.
ko: 너는 우리 중에 아무도 가진 게 없는 걸 가지고 있어.

en: Oh, come on. Why is it always this? I mean, I fuckin' owe it to myself to do this and that. What if I don't want to?
